raw_text:
Abdulaziz Essa Harib Alfalahi
General Superintendent of recruitment operations at the Emirati Human Resources Council,
Consultant at Dubai Government Human Resources Department
Phone:
0558285000
Email:
abdulaziz.harib@gmail.com
Abdulaziz Alfalahi is an accomplished executive with over25 years of transformative leadership experience in the
telecommunications and technology sectors. His career has been marked by a commitment to driving digital transformation,
spearheading innovation, and delivering sustainable growth for industry-leading organizations, including the Roads and
Transport Authority, du, and Etisalat. A strategic visionary, Abdulaziz has deep expertise in commercial project management,
human resources optimization, and advanced data analytics. His leadership in navigating complex regulatory environments and
his proﬁciency in building agile, future-ready organizations make him uniquely qualiﬁed to lead digital governance at a national
level.
As a hands-on leader, Abdulaziz has successfully managed large-scale projects that have redeﬁned organizational capabilities,
leveraging digital tools to streamline operations and enhance service delivery. His EMBA in Strategic Management and
practical, on-the-ground experience in evolving global technology landscapes position him to provide strategic direction and
governance oversight for government-led digital initiatives.
With an exceptional track record of fostering innovation and managing multidisciplinary teams, Abdulaziz is well-equipped to
deliver on the Dubai Government's vision, driving digital transformation eﬀorts that align with the UAE's long-term
development goals.
EXPERIENCE
September2022 -
Present
Emirati Human Resources Development Council
General Superintendent of Recruitment Operations in the Private Sector
Initiated and led a series of Emiratization programs aimed at boosting the representation of Emiratis in
the private sector.
Established recruitment operations to bridge the gap between job seekers and organizations with
vacancies, involving thorough analysis of supply and demand.
Performed pre-matching assessments to ensure optimal alignment between job seekers' skills and
organizations' needs.
November2021 -
Present
Dubai Government Human Resources
Consultant
Initiated the transformation of the Department of Human Resources into a data-driven organization,
enhancing human welfare and long-term economic growth.
Identiﬁed and allocated appropriate resources to relevant industries based on supply and demand
forecasts.
Collaborated with educational institutions to align industry needs with academic oﬀerings.
January2020 -
November2021
Roads and Transport Authority
Advisor - Data Management and Analytics
Initiated the transformation of the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) into a data-driven organization
from January2020 to November2021, serving as an Advisor in Data Management and Analytics.
Implemented data-driven strategies in services, marketing, and operations, leading to enhanced customer
safety and satisfaction.

July2018 -
December2019
Roads and Transport Authority
CEO - Corporate Technical Support Services
Responsible for the administration and overall direction of the Corporate Technology Support Services
Sector (CTSS), leading the development and implementation of RTA-wide Technology Strategy, including the
initiatives and projects to support the Dubai Government’s directions, such as the Dubai Smart City initiative.
A key reference to the Director-General and the Board of Executive Directors in all technology-related
issues/projects and ensuring that all aspects and activities obtain maximum beneﬁts, commensurate with
the best interest of shareholders, customers, and employees.
Responsible for attaining all established operational and ﬁnancial goals.
Provide the highest level of customer relations and services, ensuring compliance with RTA procedures.
Leading, developing, and implementing Corporate Technology Support Services Sector’s budget, proﬁts,
functions, and processes, including high-value/impact projects.
Responsible for all CTSS-related activities, including Technology Strategy & Governance, IT, Smart Services
and applications, and Automated Collection Systems
December2017 -
 July2018
 du
Vice President Strategy and Planning
Build and Communicate the Strategy
Help departments translate strategy into objectives
Measure the performance of the strategy execution
March2017 - 
December2017
Vice President Infrastructure Planning & Programs
Manage the budget planning (~AED1.1 billion)
Monitor the Project/Programs execution
Establish the processes and monitor adherence
Track and clear audit items
February2015 - 
March2017
Vice President Core Services Planning and Development
Design, source, and implement Core Services elements
Integrate with IT service provisioning and billing
Handled a budget of AED100 million
July2013 - 
February2015
Vice President Netwok Operations
Looked after the Operations and Maintenance of the whole network of du, including Wired/Wireless
access, Fiber back-hauling, Transport and Core Network, Core Services, Data Centers, International
Gateways, NOC, and Submarine Landing Stations
Optimized and Saved OPEX
Initiated the creation of a subsidiary to convert Cost Centers to Proﬁt Centers
Lead750 employees 
August2009 - 
July2013
Vice President Transport and Access Development and Operations
Design, source, implement and Operate Access and Transport Network
Introduced Deep Packet Inspection technology into the Network
Prevented Monitory losses through rate limiting/blocking unauthorized Voice over IP - VoIP
Blocked illegal Bittorrent sharing 
Helped the commercial team have better insights of the Data usage through Big Data and Analytics
Handled a budget of AED400 million
Managed36 people
August1998 - 
July2009 (11
years)
Etisalat
Senior Director Core Network Development
Engineer Mobile switching - GSM expansion projects
Engineer Thuraya Satellite Telecommunications - Seconded by Etisalat to look after the Ground Segment
Senior Engineer - Internet and E-Solutions looking after the Data Centers enhancements and expansions
Senior Manager - Core Network - CanarTel in Sudan
Senior Manager - Broadband Wireless Radio Planning and Technical Sales - CanarTel in Sudan
Director - Projects - Data Transport Network - Etisalat

Senior Director - Core Network Development - Etisalat handling a budget of AED400 million
April1998 - July
1998
UNIS LUMIN, Inc. - Canada
Engineer
Attended Telecom consulting sessions with establishments from diﬀerent industries such as health sector,
education sector, ﬁnancial institutes and Contact Centers. This was as part of my work placement as a
graduation prerequisite.
EDUCATION
2009 -2011
Higher Colleges of Technology
EMBA, Strategic Management - GPA3.6
1997 -1998
Sheridan College
Post Graduate, Telecommunications Management, 
1993 -1997
Higher Colleges of Technology
Industrial Electronics Engineering, 
CERTIFICATIONS
August2022
The Artiﬁcial Intelligence Program
The Artiﬁcial Intelligence Program in collaboration with the University of Oxford
Certiﬁed in 'The Artiﬁcial Intelligence Program' in August2022.
This specialized training program is managed by the National Program for Artiﬁcial Intelligence in the
United Arab Emirates and facilitated by the University of Oxford.
The program introduces Artiﬁcial Intelligence and the latest developments in generative AI, examining the
challenges, opportunities, security, and ethical risks associated with its adoption.
It also oﬀers insights on eﬀectively utilizing AI tools in a modern organization.
Through this program, I gained a strong understanding of current global trends in Artiﬁcial Intelligence
technologies, the latest developments in Large Language Models, and their role in our ever-changing
world.
The Artiﬁcial Intelligence Program authorizes the certiﬁcation in collaboration with the University of
Oxford.
